name: TSE-2026 | 240mm f/5.6 | ISO 100 | wide outer corona + C3 burst
notes: Setup      : Sony A7R IVa + 240mm f/5.6, ISO 100, fixed throughout
ND filter  : required for partial phases (ND 5.0 = 1/100 000)
Max = 2026-08-12T20:29:54.050Z  (totality midpoint)
Totality   = 103.9 s
Exposure formula: t = f² / (ISO × 2^Q_eff),  Q_eff = Q − ΔEV
Altitude correction at h=8°: ΔEV = 0.13 / sin(8°) ≈ 0.94 EV
Exposures (f/5.6, ISO 100, h=8°, ΔEV=0.94):
Diamond Ring / Chromosphere  Q= 8  Q_eff= 7.06  t ≈ 1/400 s
Prominences                  Q= 9  Q_eff= 8.06  t ≈ 1/850 s
Inner corona < 0.1 R☉       Q= 7  Q_eff= 6.06  t ≈ 1/213 s
Inner corona < 0.2 R☉       Q= 5  Q_eff= 4.06  t ≈  1/53 s
Middle corona < 0.5 R☉      Q= 3  Q_eff= 2.06  t ≈  1/13 s
Corona < 1.0 R☉             Q= 1  Q_eff= 0.06  t ≈   0.30 s
Corona < 2.0 R☉             Q= 0  Q_eff=-0.94  t ≈   0.60 s
Corona < 4.0 R☉             Q=-1  Q_eff=-1.94  t ≈   1.20 s
Corona < 8.0 R☉             Q=-3  Q_eff=-3.94  t ≈   4.79 s  → single
Earthshine                  Q=-5  Q_eff=-5.94  t ≈  19.3  s  → single
Totality time budget (103.9 s):
Fast phase C2 (chromosphere → middle corona):  ~15 s
Bracket 1 R☉ (0.3 s centre, 5 shots cont):     ~4 s
Bracket 2 R☉ (0.6 s centre, 5 shots cont):     ~6 s
Bracket 4 R☉ (1.2 s centre, 5 shots cont):    ~11 s
Single 8 R☉ (5 s):                              ~6 s
Earthshine single (20 s):                      ~21 s
Mirror post-max (4R☉ + 2R☉ + inner):          ~22 s
Total: ~85 s  —  ~18 s margin for overhead and inner-corona-post
C3 strategy — continuous burst (cont-hi, SS 1/8000, ISO 100):
Burst starts at C3−10 s and runs until timeout (112 s, until C3+102 s).
All C3 sub-phases (Diamond Ring, Baily's beads, chromosphere) fit inside the
~11 s buffer-fill window at full speed (~6.6 fps).
MEASURED on ILCE-7RM4A (2026-05-27, lossless compressed RAW ~45 MB/frame, UHS-II):
cont-hi+  buffer fill: ~7 s / 73 frames / ~10.0 fps
cont-hi   buffer fill: ~11 s / 73 frames / ~6.6 fps  ← production choice
write-limited rate   : ~2.4 fps (card ~130 MB/s, file ~45 MB)
buffer drain after burst release: ~26 s
Total frames in 112 s window (cont-hi): ~73 fill + ~240 write-limited ≈ 310 frames.
ND 5.0 filter: fit manually at C3+15 s — independent of camera state.
Buffer fully clear by C3+15+26 = C3+41 s; partial bracket starts at C3+120 s (safe).

steps._section: === PARTIAL PHASE C1 → C2-30s (ND 5.0 filter required) ===
steps.label: partial-pre-ND5

steps._note: Earthshine t_NASA=19.3 s. Start 9.5 s before midpoint (20:29:54.05Z) → 20:29:44.5Z
steps.label: earthshine

steps._section: === C3 DIAMOND RING + BAILY'S BEADS — continuous burst ===
steps._note: Burst starts C3-10s, runs 112s (until C3+102s). Captures diamond ring and
steps._note2: first partial crescent. count=5000 is never reached — timeout is the gate.
steps._note3: IMPORTANT: ND 5.0 filter must be on before C3+120s (partial bracket below).
steps.label: C3-burst

steps._section: === PARTIAL PHASE C3+120s → dusk (ND 5.0 filter required) ===
steps._note: Starts C3+120s — 18s after burst ends, allowing time to fit ND filter.
steps.label: partial-post-ND5
